49:
Since we've arrived in Whitebrim Front, I've seen no travelers arrive by the eastern gate. Moreover, he said he glimpsed a “silhouette illuminated by the light of the city,” which would imply that the inquisitor came from <Emphasis>north</Emphasis> of the eastern gate, not south.
But it cannot be so─that way lies naught but a deep chasm.
